title: podman pod --hostname: not working in RHEL8
body:
```console
# podman pod create --name=mypod --hostname=foo.com
1f91b7aa5ff3f5255c31073d98474ee15e2ca1a66f89fb120c3eb21bec6ff2ab

# podman run --rm --pod mypod alpine hostname
44b350a23c72      <---- expected: foo.com

# podman run --rm --pod mypod alpine hostname
7ead774d363f      <---- different result each time
```
podman-2.0.0-0.3.rc4.module+el8.3.0+6918+d949891b.x86_64

Both root and rootless

comments.body: Doesn't reproduce on my system, investigating further
